What is NeoBot?

A trading bot that grows your money on autopilot

NeoBot is an automated trading algorithm. It trades Gold (XAUUSD) 24/5 on your own broker account.

Your money stays yours

Funds sit in your own broker account. You can withdraw anytime.

Fully automated

Trades Gold (XAUUSD) Monday to Friday. No charts to watch, no signals to follow.

0 Knowledge Needed

NeoBot analyzes and executes trades automatically. Your only job is to receive the returns.

Investment, Not Trading

Grow your capital through compounding over time and let your money work for you.

Solution driven

Built to solve the problems traders actually face

Unlock the power of precision trading with NeoBot — engineered for consistent performance in the gold market.

They don't understand markets

Zero knowledge needed

NeoBot analyzes and executes in the markets automatically, you sit back & get your returns.

They fear losing money

Manage your exposure

Set your drawdown exposure, making risk a choice — not a fate.

They don't have time

Fully automated

NeoBot runs in the background Monday to Friday — you don't have to do anything.

  • Hands-off approach using an EA
  • Direct support from the team
  • Monitor anytime, anywhere
  • Cancel anytime — low commitment, high value

Process

How it works

Four steps between you and a fully automated account. Nothing about your funds ever leaves your own broker.

Step 1 — Open

Open an MT5 account

Choose one of 7 supported brokers and open a new standard MT5 account.

Step 2 — Fund

Deposit $1,000 minimum

We suggest funding $50–$100 above minimum to comfortably absorb broker commissions.

Step 3 — Connect

Trades copy automatically

Once connected, NeoBot's trades are mirrored into your account in real time. No manual entry required.

Step 4 — Control

Stay in full control

You can withdraw funds or disconnect the bot at any time. Your capital never leaves your custody.

Set expectations

Built for serious investors

This is investing, not gambling — here's what to actually expect.

Gradual growth

Patience over speed

Trades may not happen every day — days or weeks may be low activity. Profits are built gradually and consistently.

Risk managed

Protected by design

NeoBot avoids trading during unstable market conditions and major news events, prioritizing risk management over fast profits.

5,000+ Community

Join 5,000+ members

A growing community of investors already automating their strategy with NeoBot — built for people who value consistency over hype.

Note: To see better results it is suggested that you give it 2–3 months to observe the bot's performance.

FAQ

Common questions

What do I get during the free trial?

You get to try NeoBot for a full 30 days and keep 100% of any profits made during that time. It's your chance to see real, live results on your own account before committing to anything. At the end of the trial you simply choose to continue or cancel — no strings attached.

How does the 30% Profit Split plan work?

With the Profit Split plan you pay nothing upfront. NeoBot only earns when you do — we take 30% of the profits and you keep the other 70%. This plan is available on Vantage accounts only.

What does the $119/month subscription include?

This plan is coming soon. Once live, the monthly subscription will let you connect as many broker accounts as you like, and it's best suited for accounts of $5,000 and above. You'll pay a flat monthly fee, keep 100% of your profits, and be able to cancel anytime. For now, NeoBot runs on Vantage only.

What do I get with $1,499 Lifetime Access?

Lifetime Access is a one-time payment with no recurring fees ever. You get full access to the bot — including the ability to change the settings yourself — and you keep 100% of your profits. It's best suited for serious, long-term users.

Does NeoBot access or hold my money?

No. NeoBot never holds or controls your funds. Your money stays in your own broker account, fully under your control at all times.

What are the risks of automated trading?

Trading involves risk, including the possible loss of part or all of your capital. Results vary with market conditions. A default 30% maximum drawdown helps manage risk, and it can be adjusted to suit your preference.

Do I need to do anything once the bot is activated?

No. Once active, the automation runs independently. You're free to monitor your broker and MT5 account and manage your funds whenever you like.

Can I withdraw my money at any time?

Yes. Your funds remain in your broker account, and you can withdraw them whenever you want. However, keep in mind that the goal of this trading bot is long-term compounding. NeoBot cannot access or move your money.

Does NeoBot trade every day?

No. NeoBot is built for consistency and stability. During unstable markets or major economic news, it simply won't trade — that's deliberate, and in your best interest.

I already have an account with one of your brokers, what should I do?

NeoBot currently runs on Vantage only, and access requires a newly registered Vantage account. We do not accept transfers of affiliation with existing accounts. Support for additional brokers is coming soon.
